mantras: Where do you feel the breath most distinctly?
What is the shape of the feeling most apparent?
Can you notice the feeling of sitting?
Is the mind calm or busy right now?
Who is aware of this moment?
What sounds can you hear without labeling them?
What are you resisting right now?
mantras2: What is the quality of your breath?
Can you feel the weight of your body on the ground?
What sensations are most prominent in your body?
Is there a sense of urgency in your thoughts?
What emotions are present right now?
Can you observe your thoughts without getting caught up in them?
What is the space around you like right now?
How does your body feel in this moment?
What is the nature of awareness itself?
